_note: Geografske tačke porekla duvana — po zemlji grupisano, sa storytelling-om po jeziku.

sr.name: Vuelta Abajo
sr.story: Srce svih kubanskih cigara. Pojas od 70 kilometara između Sijera dos Organos i mora daje zemlji onaj mineralni koktel koji ne postoji nigde drugde. Svaka Cohiba, svaki Montecristo, svaka Partagas — prolaze kroz ovo polje. Vlažnost jutarnjih pljuskova, žestina popodneva i trenutak mirovanja pred sutonom su tri pokreta koji pretvaraju list u aromu.
sr.brands: Cohiba · Montecristo · Partagas · H. Upmann · Romeo y Julieta

en.name: Vuelta Abajo
en.story: The heart of every Cuban cigar. A 70-kilometer belt between the Sierra de los Órganos and the sea gives this earth a mineral cocktail found nowhere else. Every Cohiba, every Montecristo, every Partagas — passes through this field. Morning rain, afternoon heat, and the stillness before dusk are the three movements that turn leaf into aroma.
en.brands: Cohiba · Montecristo · Partagas · H. Upmann · Romeo y Julieta

sr.name: Semi Vuelta
sr.story: Severni brat Vuelta Abajo-a. Malo viši tereni, malo manje vlažan vazduh — duvan iz ove regije nosi čvršću strukturu, pa se koristi kada cigari treba kičma. Pogodno za omotače koji drže cigaru tokom celog pušenja, bez raspadanja.
sr.brands: Hoyo de Monterrey · Rafael González · Quinteros

en.name: Semi Vuelta
en.story: Vuelta Abajo's northern brother. Slightly higher terrain, slightly drier air — tobacco from this region carries a firmer structure and is used when a cigar needs a spine. Ideal for wrappers that hold a cigar together through the entire smoke.
en.brands: Hoyo de Monterrey · Rafael González · Quinteros

sr.name: Partido
sr.story: Najstariji duvanski kraj na Kubi — pre Vuelta Abajo-a, Partido je bio rezervisan za kraljeve i pape. Danas vrlo mala proizvodnja, samo oni kojima majstorstvo nije dovoljno — njima treba i istorija. Ovde se još uvek rola pored samih polja.

en.name: Partido
en.story: The oldest tobacco region in Cuba — before Vuelta Abajo, Partido was reserved for kings and popes. Today production is tiny, reserved for those to whom craftsmanship alone isn't enough — they also want history. Rolling still happens beside the fields themselves.

sr.name: Remedios (Villas)
sr.story: Centralna Kuba — zemlja koja daje punije telo i tamne omotače. Remedios duvan se retko nalazi u top brendovima sam, ali je kičma filera mnogih cigara. Ko traži kubansku robusnost, ovde gleda.

en.name: Remedios (Villas)
en.story: Central Cuba — soil that gives fuller body and darker wrappers. Remedios tobacco rarely headlines a top brand alone, but forms the spine of many filler blends. If you want Cuban robustness, this is where you look.

sr.name: Oriente
sr.story: Istočni kraj ostrva — toplije, suvlje, sa vulkanskim uticajem. Duvan odavde ima zemljaniju notu, skoro kao nikaragvanski. Uglavnom za domaće kubansko tržište i lokalne brendove.

en.name: Oriente
en.story: The eastern end of the island — warmer, drier, with volcanic influence. Tobacco here has a more earthy note, almost Nicaraguan. Mostly kept for the domestic Cuban market and local brands.

sr.name: Cibao dolina
sr.story: Najveća dolina Kariba — i, otkako je Kuba zatvorila granice za SAD 1962, centar svetske premium cigar proizvodnje. Zemlja je ovde balansirana: dovoljno plodna da daje gust duvan, dovoljno fina da dim bude kremast. Davidoff, Fuente i Ashton imaju fabrike upravo ovde.
sr.brands: Davidoff · Villiger · Drew Estate · E. P. Carrillo

en.name: Cibao Valley
en.story: The largest valley in the Caribbean — and, since Cuba closed to the US in 1962, the center of the world's premium cigar production. The soil is balanced here: fertile enough for dense tobacco, fine enough for creamy smoke. Davidoff, Fuente, and Ashton all have their factories here.
en.brands: Davidoff · Villiger · Drew Estate · E. P. Carrillo

sr.name: La Canela
sr.story: Najsevernija tačka Cibao doline. Duvan sa jačom notom kedra i slatkog drveta — odlično za binder i filler u rafiniranim blendovima. Ovde se prave omotači koji se dobro čuvaju decenijama.

en.name: La Canela
en.story: The northernmost point of Cibao. Tobacco with a stronger note of cedar and sweet wood — excellent as binder and filler in refined blends. Wrappers aged here keep well for decades.

sr.name: Bonao
sr.story: Planinski mikroregion iznad Cibao-a. Niže temperature, sporiji rast — duvan razvija složeniji profil. Često se koristi kao binder koji drži kompleksne filler blendove zajedno bez dominantnog ukusa.

en.name: Bonao
en.story: A mountainous microregion above Cibao. Lower temperatures, slower growth — tobacco develops a more complex profile. Often used as binder, holding complex filler blends together without a dominant taste of its own.

sr.name: Villa González
sr.story: Gradić iznad Santiago-a gde je Carlos Fuente 1980-ih obnovio porodičnu tradiciju posle kubanskog embarga. Danas se Arturo Fuente OpusX uzgaja isključivo u Chateau de la Fuente plantaži — prva prava dominikanska omotačica na svetu.

en.name: Villa González
en.story: A small town above Santiago where Carlos Fuente revived the family tradition in the 1980s after the Cuban embargo. Today Arturo Fuente OpusX is grown exclusively on the Chateau de la Fuente plantation — the first true Dominican wrapper in the world.

sr.name: Estelí
sr.story: Cigar prestonica Nikaragve. Vulkansko tlo bogato mineralima, hladne noći i tople dane — kombinacija koja daje punije, paprenije duvane nego Kuba. Ako voliš snagu, ovde je izvor. Padrón, Plasencia, My Father — sve dolazi iz Estelí-ja.
sr.brands: Plasencia · Joya de Nicaragua · Despot · J. C. Newman

en.name: Estelí
en.story: The cigar capital of Nicaragua. Volcanic soil rich in minerals, cold nights and warm days — a combination that produces fuller, peppier tobacco than Cuba. If you love strength, this is the source. Padrón, Plasencia, My Father — all come from Estelí.
en.brands: Plasencia · Joya de Nicaragua · Despot · J. C. Newman

sr.name: Jalapa
sr.story: Severna Nikaragva, na granici sa Hondurasom. Tlo je peskovitije nego u Estelí-ju — rezultat je slađi, elegantniji duvan. Jalapa omotači daju cigari notu med-a i kedra, sa manje agresivnosti nego njihova južna braća.

en.name: Jalapa
en.story: Northern Nicaragua, on the Honduran border. The soil is sandier than in Estelí — the result is sweeter, more elegant tobacco. Jalapa wrappers bring notes of honey and cedar, with less aggression than their southern brothers.

sr.name: Condega
sr.story: Mali grad između Estelí-ja i Jalapa-e. Duvan odavde spaja snagu jednog i eleganciju drugog — idealan binder za kompleksne nikaragvanske blendove.

en.name: Condega
en.story: A small town between Estelí and Jalapa. Tobacco here combines the strength of one and the elegance of the other — an ideal binder for complex Nicaraguan blends.

sr.name: Ometepe
sr.story: Vulkansko ostrvo u jezeru Nikaragva. Dva vulkana, jedan aktivan — i duvan koji raste u njihovoj senci ima pepeo u DNK. Retka, limitirana izdanja koja se brzo prodaju kad se pojave.

en.name: Ometepe
en.story: A volcanic island in Lake Nicaragua. Two volcanoes, one active — and tobacco that grows in their shadow carries ash in its DNA. Rare, limited releases that sell out as fast as they arrive.

sr.name: Jamastran
sr.story: Jedina honduraška dolina gde se duvan uzgaja na 600m nadmorske visine. Rezultat — orašasti, topli profili sa notama kože i pečenog hleba. Ukoliko voliš srednjejake cigare, Jamastran ti je na radaru.
sr.brands: Maya Selva · La Flor de Copán

en.name: Jamastran
en.story: The only Honduran valley where tobacco is grown at 600m altitude. The result — nutty, warm profiles with notes of leather and baked bread. If you love medium-strong cigars, Jamastran is on your radar.
en.brands: Maya Selva · La Flor de Copán

sr.name: Copán
sr.story: Blizu Gvatemalske granice, u senci Maya piramida. Duvan ovde ima nešto prašnjavo-slatko u karakteru, podseća na kafu sa kardamomom. Manji obim, ali privrženi poštovaoci.
sr.brands: Julio R. Eiroa · La Flor de Copán

en.name: Copán
en.story: Near the Guatemalan border, in the shadow of Maya pyramids. Tobacco here has something dusty-sweet in its character, reminiscent of coffee with cardamom. Small volume, but devoted followers.
en.brands: Julio R. Eiroa · La Flor de Copán

sr.name: Danlí
sr.story: Glavno duvansko naselje Hondurasa. Ovde su sve veće fabrike. Danlí duvan ima konzistentan, pouzdan profil — ništa dramatično, ali uvek korektno.

en.name: Danlí
en.story: Honduras's main tobacco town. All the larger factories are here. Danlí tobacco has a consistent, reliable profile — nothing dramatic, but always correct.

sr.name: Turrialba
sr.story: Aktivni vulkan Turrialba đubri polja pepelom svake godine. Rezultat je duvan sa mineralnim profilom — blago, elegantno, skoro aromatično. Kao cigar za jutro, uz espresso i tišinu.

en.name: Turrialba
en.story: The active Turrialba volcano fertilizes the fields with ash every year. The result is tobacco with a mineral profile — mild, elegant, almost aromatic. A morning cigar, paired with espresso and silence.

sr.name: San Andrés Tuxtla
sr.story: Meksička dolina vulkanskog porekla, od 17. veka središte duvanske tradicije. San Andrés Negro omotači su tamni, slatko-gorki, i koriste se u mnogim nemeksičkim premium blendovima. Diskretni heroj cigar sveta.

en.name: San Andrés Tuxtla
en.story: A Mexican valley of volcanic origin, a center of tobacco tradition since the 17th century. San Andrés Negro wrappers are dark, bittersweet, and used across many non-Mexican premium blends. The quiet hero of the cigar world.

sr.name: Toskana
sr.story: Jedina evropska regija sa istinski autonomnom cigar tradicijom. Kentucky duvan uzgajan u italijanskom zemljištu od 1818. godine — firmentacija traje devet meseci, proces niko nije promenio u dva veka. Toskansko cigar ne liči ni na jednu drugu na svetu.

en.name: Tuscany
en.story: The only European region with a truly autonomous cigar tradition. Kentucky tobacco grown in Italian soil since 1818 — fermentation runs for nine months, a process no one has changed in two centuries. The Tuscan cigar resembles no other in the world.
